original_prompt: 给这个一套首饰做一张亚马逊主图，要求以有创意的排版版式分别展示产品细节，背景是一个欧洲模特带着这套首饰。
optimized_prompt:
[Visual Description] A high-end Amazon product composite image featuring a stunning European model with an elegant bridal updo hairstyle. She is wearing the [Subject Lock: cohesive bridal jewelry parure, featuring the graduated cathedral tiara with pear-cut crystal centerpiece, the plunging V-shape necklace with articulated floral links, and the diamond-silhouette drop earrings]. The lighting is soft, high-key commercial studio style, specifically designed to catch the fire and brilliance of the clear faceted cubic zirconia and silver-tone alloy. The background is a clean, out-of-focus soft grey or creamy bokeh to maintain focus on the jewelry. 

[Text & UI Layout] A creative split-layout composition. The main model portrait occupies the left 2/3 of the frame. On the right, floating circular zoom-in inserts highlight the 'Openwork Filigree' texture and the 'Pear-Cut Center Stone'. Elegant serif English text overlays in the upper right empty space: Main Title 'ROYAL ELEGANCE', Sub Title 'Complete Bridal Crystal Set'.
layout_logic: 建议采用'黄金分割'构图。模特视线向画幅内侧（例如向右），文案和细节特写图置于模特视线前方（右侧留白处）。这种视线引导能增加画面的流动感。特写镜头建议添加极细的银色边框，以呼应产品的材质，增强精致度。
